data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for visibility controls and retention lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of visibility controls and retention lifecycle, but there is no evidence provided that confirms these elements exist in the current saga state. The linked use case mentions the need for visibility controls and retention lifecycle, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of these functionalities being implemented or verified. This leads to an inconclusive result as the necessary data to confirm the requirement is absent.
gaps: No evidence of visibility controls and retention lifecycle in the current saga state.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify visibility controls and retention lifecycle.
